name: alpha_001_quality_revcombo
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(est_netprofit, enterprise_value), 252)), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(add(subtract(ts_mean(close, 6), close), ts_zscore(divide(cash, assets), 252))), subindustry))

name: alpha_002_quality_stable_cf
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(subtract(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(ts_std_dev(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 126), 252)), add(ts_zscore(divide(est_netprofit, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252)))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 7), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_003_quality_lowdebt_rev
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252)), ts_zscore(divide(subtract(cash, debt), enterprise_value), 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 5), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_004_analyst_quality_rev
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(analyst_revision_rank_derivative, 252)), add(ts_zscore(divide(est_netprofit, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252)))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 6), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_005_efficiency_reversal
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(cashflow_efficiency_rank_derivative, 252)), add(ts_zscore(divide(est_netprofit, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, assets), 252)))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 6), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_006_value_quality_rev
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(bookvalue_ps, close), 252)), add(ts_zscore(divide(est_netprofit, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252)))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 7), close)), subindustry))
